channel.title: News on Chuang YANG | Researcher of Robotics & Neuroscience
channel.description: Recent content in News on Chuang YANG | Researcher of Robotics & Neuroscience
channel.copyright: 版权所有 © 2020 杨闯 All Rights Reserved

item.title: Completion of NMA school
item.description: I took part in Neuromatch Academy, a fully-virtual computational neuroscience school, and won the certificate of completion with the course project How does task related activity interact with intrinsic activity of the brain?

item.title: Second Prize in the 12th Electronic Design Competition
item.description: On-line monitoring system of transmission line’s galloping In order to effectively reduce and control vibration of transmission lines,a transmission line vibration analysis method was proposed with a time series piecewise model based on parameters inertial measurement.

item.title: Third prize in the 4th PEIDC
item.description: Orientation estimation system for MWD In order to obtain an optimal orientation of the bottom hole assembly while drilling, a novel robust Mag/INS-based orientation estimation algorithm, designed to support a magnetic/inertial-based Measurement While Drilling (MWD) surveying system, is proposed and assessed.
